title: senecio merceris
intro: Senecio merceris, also known as groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Senecio merceris include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and fever, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve overall cardiovascular health. Traditionally, Senecio merceris has been prepared as a herbal remedy by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
